items.title: The AI Skill Nobody's Practicing
items.excerpt: Zapier just added "accountability" as a fourth AI hiring requirement. Here's why the gap between reviewing AI output and actually checking it is the skill most professionals are missing.
items.author: Max Bernstein

items.title: Nobody Read the Fine Print
items.excerpt: In the 1950s, the washing machine promised women more free time. By the 1970s, they were doing more laundry than before. AI is running the same play. Faster.
items.author: Max Bernstein

items.title: Come build tomorrow. Cancel if you hate it.

items.title: The Death of How-To Content
items.excerpt: AI is doing to how-to content what the internet did to encyclopedias.

items.title: The Silent Killer of the AI Era
items.excerpt: A Harvard MBA picked the wrong case study and lost his company. Not because he lacked experience - because he had too much. Here's how expertise becomes a trap.
items.author: Max Bernstein
